question: [File: 'File Name: rest/transactions.js -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: getTransactionsByTransactionIdsSql()] Can an unprivileged external user cause the params array to grow proportionally to the number of inner_transactions entries, causing the DB to receive a query with a very large number of bind parameters and exhausting DB query planning memory when inner_transactions contains many [payer, timestamp] pairs?
